# AI Rules

Rules for any AI assistant working in this repository.

## Code style

- Do not write docstrings.
- Any new code file created by the AI must start with the marker comment `# Generated by AI` on the very first line (use the appropriate comment syntax for the language). This rule applies unconditionally to every new file created by the AI, including files the user explicitly asked the AI to create. It does not apply to files the AI only edits.

## Verification after code changes

- After making any change to Python code, the AI must run both `ruff check` and `pyrefly check` from the `src/` directory and ensure both pass with zero errors before reporting the task as done.
- If either reports errors, fix them and rerun until clean.

## Cloudflare and R2

- Never run code that interacts with Cloudflare in any way, including any read or write operation against Cloudflare R2.
- For reading archived images, use only the public mirror at `https://bing.npanuhin.me`.
- Do not execute scripts that authenticate with Cloudflare, list buckets, upload, delete, or otherwise touch R2 objects directly.
